title: Beach, safari and everything in-between: Three must-visit Mozambican islands
description: TOURISM NEWS - Decided to go on a...
bodyText:
TOURISM NEWS - Decided to go on a last-minute island getaway this December? Good for you!

With the help of Pentravel, we know just the place – or three… pack your bikini and your safari suite and pick your destination here:


> Magaruque Island: One of Southern Africa’s premier destinations for safari vacations


Part of the Savegre Archipelago set in the Bazaruto National Park, Magaruque Island is located halfway between Mozambique to the north and Zimbabwe to the south. Boasting a gorgeous beach, natural coral reefs and mesmerizing jungle scenery, it’s no wonder this gem has become a travel bucket-list must-have.

Whether you’re looking for a secluded romantic getaway or just some time to disconnect from the world and reconnect with nature, Magaruque Isalnd can provide an inspiring escapade like no other!


> Benguerra Island: A unique getaway in every sense


For those looking for an inspirational and unique getaway, Benguerra Island is the place! This Mozambican island offers an unforgettable experience with its stunning landscapes and incredible safari options.

It’s a great destination for nature lovers not just due to its exotic flora and fauna, but also due to its many diverse outdoor activities such as snorkeling, fishing and kayaking.

There are numerous wildlife sanctuaries here that enable visitors to immerse themselves in the natural beauty of the region while appreciating all of its biodiversity.

With its captivating beaches, fascinating culture and charming hospitality, Benguerra Island promises a truly remarkable vacation like no other!


> Quilalea Island: Luxury in paradise


Quilalea Island in Mozambique is an absolute paradise. Located just off the coast of Mozambique, this private island resort offers its guests a beautiful and luxurious safari experience.

Whether you are looking to explore the island by paddle board, snorkel among the vibrant coral reefs or search for wild game on foot, Quilalea has something for everyone.

With pristine beaches and clear waters, it’s no surprise that this unique oasis continues to draw visitors from around the world looking for tranquility and adventure.

For more on travel, visit Get It Magazine.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
